context: Agent is about to start a non-trivial implementation task and should search memory first

checklist.name: Runs vault-cli search before writing code
checklist.description: Runs `vault-cli search` before producing any implementation code

checklist.name: Uses a relevant query
checklist.description: The search query is relevant to the task (e.g., 'payments', 'billing-service', 'endpoint', or similar)

checklist.name: Uses --project flag
checklist.description: Scopes the search with `--project billing-service` (or similar)

checklist.name: Explains the search intent
checklist.description: Notes that searching is to check for prior decisions or constraints before implementing

checklist.name: Correct command syntax
checklist.description: The vault-cli search command is syntactically correct
